title: Total income or loss 2023
description: Complete the total income or loss section of your tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, income, loss, instruction, tax return 2023, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Go to Total income or loss on page 3 in your tax return.
Check that you have shown all your income.
Add up all the amounts in the right-hand column for questions 1 to 12 on pages 2 to 3 in your tax return.

If below question 12 in your tax return you have no amount at label I go to step 4, otherwise read on. If the amount at label I is a loss you take it away from your total from step 2, otherwise add the amount at label I to your total from step 2.
Write your answer at Total income or loss .
If your answer is a loss, print L in the LOSS box at the right of Total income or loss .

items: Go to question D1 Work-related car expenses 2023 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2023 .
Go back to Income in the supplementary tax return 2023 .

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
Go to Total income or loss on page 3 in your tax return.
### Step 1
Check that you have shown all your income.
### Step 2
Add up all the amounts in the right-hand column for questions 1 to 12 on pages 2 to 3 in your tax return.
### Step 3
If below question 12 in your tax return you have no amount at label I go to step 4, otherwise read on. If the amount at label I is a loss you take it away from your total from step 2, otherwise add the amount at label I to your total from step 2.
### Step 4
Write your answer at Total income or loss .
If your answer is a loss, print L in the LOSS box at the right of Total income or loss .
## Where to go next
- Go to question D1 Work-related car expenses 2023 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2023 .
- Go back to Income in the supplementary tax return 2023 .
